failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    id AS profile_id,
    username,
    biography
FROM profile,
     to_tsquery('english', 'pizza') AS query
WHERE biography_lexemes @@ query
ORDER BY ts_rank(biography_lexemes, query) DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    p.id AS profile_id,
    p.username,
    p.biography
FROM profile p,
     plainto_tsquery('english', 'pizza') AS query
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ query
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, query) DESC
LIMIT 10;
